articles.title: Anatoly Yakovenko and Mert Mumtaz break down what’s only possible on Solana
articles.description: Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko and Helius co-founder Mert Mumtaz unpack why they thinkSolana has an edge over other blockchains.

articles.title: Cardano Founder Unintentionally Promotes Memecoin In Social Media Slip
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder and creator of Cardano has recently caused quite a frenzy in the cryptocurrency community when he unwittingly promoted a meme coin crypto project known as Freya through social media. Significance Of The Cardano Founder’s Unwitting Mistake The recent development took place after Charles Hoskinson posted an adorable photo of him and […]

articles.title: Solana Founder Reflects on Humble Beginnings as SOL Soars 312%
articles.description: Recently, Anatoly Yakovenko, one of the co-founders of Solana, took to X (formerly Twitter) to reflect on the journey that led to the creation of Solana, a crypto project that has now grown to a valuation exceeding $30 billion. In the post on X (formerly Twitter), Yakovenko remarked that December 9 marks exactly six years […]

articles.title: Bonk (BONK) surges to become third-largest memecoin
articles.description: In a surprising turn of events, the Solana-based dog-themed memecoin, Bonk (BONK), has climbed the ranks to become the third-largest memecoin by market capitalization. This unexpected surge occurred on December 8th, as Bonk’s recent price growth soared by an impressive 370% in just the last month. CoinGecko data now reveals that Bonk boasts a market ... Read more

articles.title: Solana Closes Gap on Ethereum with Over $16M in NFT Sales
articles.description: Solana emerges as a formidable threat to Ethereum's throne as the network looks to outshine it from different angles.
